CustomSql.Name: player_health
CustomSql.SqlQuery:
SELECT
  events.payload.event.event_id::VARCHAR as event_id,
  events.payload.event.event_type::VARCHAR as event_type,
  events.payload.event.app_version::VARCHAR as app_version,
  date(timestamp 'epoch' + events.payload.event.event_timestamp::BIGINT * interval '1 second') as event_date,
  CASE NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.country_id::VARCHAR, '')
    WHEN 'UK' THEN 'United Kingdom'
    ELSE INITCAP(LOWER(NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.country_id::VARCHAR, '')))
  END as country,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.platform::VARCHAR, '') as platform,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.report_reason::VARCHAR, '') as report_reason,
  CAST(NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.user_rating::VARCHAR, '') AS INTEGER) as user_rating,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.user_rank_reached::VARCHAR, '') as rank_reached,
  NULLIF(events.payload.event.event_data.tutorial_screen_id::VARCHAR, '') AS tutorial_screen_id,
  1 as event_count
FROM "<EVENTS_DATABASE>"."public"."event_data_mv" events
WHERE events.payload.event.event_type::VARCHAR IN ('user_registration', 'user_report', 'user_sentiment', 'user_rank_up', 'tutorial_progression')
  AND timestamp 'epoch' + events.payload.event.event_timestamp::BIGINT * interval '1 second' >= dateadd(day, -30, getdate())
